description: VERSION BUMP V51.0 → V51.1. WIN count increased from 67 to 69. Two new WINs added: WIN-068 (Eclipse Magnetic Effect — 39 eclipses) and WIN-069 (Australia Road Scaffold Validation). Accuracy claim DROPPED from 95.2% to 94.5%. This is the first accuracy decrease we've observed.
analyst_priority: HIGH — new WINs need review; accuracy drop needs investigation; our review currently covers 67 WINs
